name: Amazon GameSparks API
what_it_does: Amazon GameSparks — DISCONTINUED Oct 2023. Backend game service shut down by AWS. No longer accepting new customers or serving existing workloads. Do not use.
use_cases: DISCONTINUED — This service is shut down. Do not build new integrations against GameSparks.
Migrate existing GameSparks workloads to PlayFab, AccelByte, or Nakama before AWS terminates remaining infrastructure
Historical reference only — reviewing GameSparks architecture patterns when migrating to alternative backends
AWS GameLift remains operational for dedicated game servers — evaluate as a partial replacement for server-side GameSparks features
Document migration path: GameSparks player data export should be archived before permanent deletion
not_for: Any new game project — GameSparks is shut down; all new game backend development must use an alternative service
Production workloads — AWS has terminated GameSparks service; active integrations will fail
Any use case — this service no longer exists and cannot be integrated with
best_when: There is no valid use case for Amazon GameSparks. The service was shut down in October 2023.
avoid_when: Always — Amazon GameSparks was permanently shut down in October 2023 and is no longer operational. Use PlayFab, AccelByte, Nakama, or LootLocker instead.

auth.notes: Service is shut down. No authentication is possible. AWS shut down GameSparks in October 2023.

pricing.paid_tiers: N/A — Amazon GameSparks was shut down by AWS in October 2023. The service is no longer available for purchase or use.
pricing.notes: Amazon GameSparks was shut down permanently in October 2023. AWS announced the discontinuation and gave customers a migration window. The service is no longer available under any pricing model.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Service is shut down. All API calls will fail. No error handling is relevant.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Service is shut down. No operations are possible.
known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Amazon GameSparks was shut down in October 2023 — any agent attempting to call GameSparks APIs will receive connection failures or 404 errors
AWS documentation for GameSparks may still be indexed in search results but links to a shutdown notice — do not rely on archived docs for active development
SDKs for GameSparks are deprecated and unmaintained — they will not compile against current AWS SDK versions
Player data stored in GameSparks was only available for export during the migration window — it is likely permanently lost if not exported
Any codebase referencing GameSparks must be migrated to an alternative backend before it can function — this is a hard dependency that cannot be worked around

security_score_components.security_notes: Service is shut down. No security posture is relevant. Do not integrate with GameSparks.
